title: notifications-in-app — error codes
description: Channel-scoped error codes. Module namespace: NOTIFICATIONS_INAPP_.

errors.description: Reverb dispatch raised an exception. DB write still succeeded — user will see the notification on next inbox refresh. Not retryable (would duplicate).
Reverb HTTP admin API returned 5xx or timed out. Pages ops when sustained > 5 minutes. Retryable via the notifications.in-app-live-updates feature flag suppression fallback.
